channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MITSU] Mitsu Chem Plast enters IBC segment; facility commissioning Q2 FY27
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mitsu Chem Plast Limited is undertaking a strategic expansion into the Intermediate Bulk Container (IBC) segment. This new facility is expected to be commissioned in Q2 FY27, marking a significant milestone in the company's product diversification and growth journey. The proposed facility is designed to cater to the domestic market, aiming to enhance Mitsu Chem Plast's competitiveness and strengthen its portfolio of advanced packaging solutions. This development is anticipated to bolster the company's market presence and aligns with its long-term vision of innovation and value creation.

  • Mitsu Chem Plast is strategically expanding into the Intermediate Bulk Container (IBC) segment.
  • The new IBC manufacturing facility is expected to be commissioned in Q2 FY27.
  • This expansion aims to diversify products and strengthen advanced packaging solutions.
  • The project will cater to the domestic market, enhancing the company's competitiveness.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [MRO-TEK] Umiya Buildcon Appoints YCRJ & Associates as Internal Auditors
item.description:
Umiya Buildcon Ltd (formerly MRO-TEK Realty Limited) has appointed Messrs. YCRJ and Associates, Chartered Accountants, as its Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The appointment, effective April 27, 2026, was disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. YCRJ & Associates, established in 1995 and headquartered in Bangalore, is a renowned firm with 15 full-time partners and over 100 professionals. They offer comprehensive expertise in statutory, internal, and tax audits, as well as direct and indirect tax consultancy.

  • Umiya Buildcon appointed YCRJ & Associates as Internal Auditors.
  • The appointment is for the financial year 2026-27, effective April 27, 2026.
  • YCRJ & Associates is a Bangalore-based firm established in 1995.
  • The firm comprises 15 partners and over 100 professionals.
  • The disclosure was made as per SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MRO-TEK Realty Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [ANANTRAJ] Anant Raj to form Singapore WOS for Data Center & Cloud Services
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Anant Raj Ltd's Finance and Investment Committee has approved the incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary in Singapore. The new entity, named Anant Raj Cloud Singapore Pte. Ltd., will be engaged in providing Co-location and Cloud services, including artificial intelligence (AI) services, from Data Centers and Cloud infrastructure being developed by Anant Raj. The initial subscription will be 1,000 shares of SGD 1 each, totaling SGD 1,000, for 100% shareholding. This move marks Anant Raj's expansion into the international data center and cloud services market.

  • Anant Raj to incorporate a wholly-owned subsidiary in Singapore.
  • New entity, Anant Raj Cloud Singapore Pte. Ltd., will offer data center and cloud services.
  • Initial investment for 100% shareholding is SGD 1,000.
  • Expands company's presence into international data center market.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anant Raj Limited-$ | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [NACLIND] NACL Industries: Algavista Greentech reclassified from Promoter Group
item.description:
NACL Industries Limited has received no-objection from both the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) for the re-classification of Algavista Greentech Private Limited from its Promoter Group. The approvals were granted on April 27, 2026, following the company's application dated February 3, 2026, and earlier submissions. This re-classification is in accordance with Regulation 31A(8) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. NACL Industries is now required to ensure compliance with all subsequent relevant disclosures related to this re-classification.

  • NSE and BSE granted no-objection for re-classification.
  • Algavista Greentech Private Limited reclassified from Promoter Group.
  • Approval granted under SEBI Regulation 31A(8).
  • Company must ensure compliance with future disclosures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NACL Industries Ltd | Category: Promoter Reclassification

item.title: [ANANTRAJ] Anant Raj acquires remaining 25% in Romano Projects for ₹3.58 Cr
item.description:
Anant Raj Ltd's Finance and Investment Committee approved an additional investment in Romano Projects Private Limited (RPPL), acquiring 12,500 fully paid-up equity shares, representing 25% of its paid-up capital, for ₹3,58,12,500. This acquisition will make RPPL a wholly-owned subsidiary of Anant Raj Ltd. RPPL, a real estate company, holds land in Sector 63 A, Gurugram, part of the "Anant Raj Estate" township. The acquisition aims to achieve complete ownership, operational synergies, streamlined decision-making, and enhanced managerial control. The transaction is a related party transaction, conducted at arm's length based on an independent valuation. RPPL reported nil turnover for the last three financial years.

  • Anant Raj acquires remaining 25% stake in Romano Projects.
  • Romano Projects becomes a wholly-owned subsidiary for ₹3.58 Cr.
  • Acquisition aims for operational synergies and enhanced control.
  • Romano Projects is a land-owning company in Gurugram.
  • Transaction is a related party deal, done at arm's length.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anant Raj Limited-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [CENTURYTEX] Aditya Birla Real Estate Board to meet May 6 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss and potentially recommend a dividend on the company's equity shares for the same financial year. The meeting will also involve considering the draft Directors' Report. In connection with this, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 8, 2026, two days after the financial results announcement.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026.
  • To approve FY26 audited standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Board will consider recommending a dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 8, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTURY TEXTILES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RALLIS] Rallis India Board Recommends ₹3/Share Dividend for FY26; Approves Results
item.description:
Rallis India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Concurrently, the Board recommended a dividend of ₹3 per share, representing 300%, for the Financial Year 2025-26. This dividend is subject to approval by shareholders at the forthcoming Annual General Meeting and, if approved, will be disbursed within five days of the AGM. The company's statutory auditors, BSR & Co. LLP, provided an unmodified opinion on the audited financial results. For FY26, the company reported Revenue from operations of ₹2,897 crore and a Net Profit of ₹184 crore.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY2025-26.
  • Recommended a dividend of ₹3 per share (300%) for FY2025-26.
  • Dividend payment is contingent on shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • FY26 Revenue from operations was ₹2,897 Cr, Net Profit ₹184 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RALLIS INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PSB] Punjab & Sind Bank Board Approves FY26 Results, Recommends ₹0.39 Dividend
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Punjab & Sind Bank, at its meeting on April 27, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also recommended a dividend of ₹0.39 per equity share (3.90% of face value ₹10/- each) for the financial year 2025-26. This dividend recommendation is subject to the approval of shareholders at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The filing included the Audited Financial Results, Auditors' report with an unmodified opinion, and confirmed nil deviation in the utilization of funds raised for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Recommended a dividend of ₹0.39 per equity share for FY26.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • No deviation in utilization of funds raised for Q4 FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB & SIND BANK | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GODREJPROP] GPL Board to meet May 4 for Q4/FY26 results, dividend, and debt fundraise
item.description:
Godrej Properties Ltd (GPL) has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 04, 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving the audited standalone and consolidated financial results and statements for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also consider recommending a dividend for the same financial year and discuss raising funds through debt securities via private placement. Additionally, matters related to the upcoming Annual General Meeting will be addressed. The trading window for the company's securities will be closed from April 01, 2026, to May 06, 2026, for designated persons.

  • GPL Board meeting scheduled for May 04, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Consideration of dividend recommendation for FY26.
  • Board to discuss raising funds via debt private placement.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 6, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Godrej Properties Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AGI] Agi Greenpac Approves FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Agi Greenpac Ltd's Board of Directors approved the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the auditors’ reports and a declaration on the auditors’ report with an unmodified opinion. Additionally, M/s. Protiviti India Member Private Limited was appointed as the Internal Auditors for FY2026-27. The board also approved the appointment of Mr. Ram Babu Kabra as an Additional Director and recommended the appointments/re-appointment of other Directors, subject to member approval.

  • Standalone and consolidated audited financial results for FY26 approved.
  • M/s. Protiviti India appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.
  • Ram Babu Kabra appointed as Additional Director.
  • Sushil Kumar Roongta recommended as Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Sandip Somany re-appointed as Chairman and Managing Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Agi Greenpac Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
